overview.title: Platform overview
overview.intro: Health of the whole Vitrin platform.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.name: Store name
tenants.created: Tenant created — copy this API key now (it won't be shown again):

tenantDetail.title: Tenant detail
tenantDetail.lifecycleHint: Suspend blocks the tenant; activate restores access.
tenantDetail.governanceHint: Operator controls for this tenant's data.
tenantDetail.eraseConfirm: Erase ALL data for this tenant? This cannot be undone.

users.title: Users
users.intro: Everyone with a login across the platform.

plans.title: Plans
plans.intro: Edit pricing, included credits, caps, and rate limits for each plan.
plans.note: Changes apply to new subscriptions and the next renewal cycle.
plans.name: Name

billing.title: Billing
billing.opsHint: Run period-end processing and dunning (normally scheduled).
billing.ordersEmpty: No orders yet. Checkout activates with the billing release.

usage.title: Usage monitoring
usage.intro: Platform-wide AI usage and credit consumption.
usage.empty: No usage recorded yet (needs live traffic through the gateway).

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.intro: Drill into any tenant's search & assistant metrics.
analytics.zeroEmpty: No data for this tenant yet.

models.title: Models & gateway
models.intro: Inference endpoints, routing config, and call distribution.
models.empty: No routing data yet (needs live gateway traffic).

queue.title: Queue monitoring
queue.intro: Celery broker status and pending background work.
queue.hint: Worker-level inspection (active/scheduled) is added with the observability stack.

security.title: Security monitoring
security.intro: Account lockouts, failed logins, and recent auth events.

synonyms.title: Synonyms
synonyms.intro: Curate the per-tenant synonym set used by Persian search.

flags.title: Feature flags
flags.intro: Toggle platform capabilities without a deploy.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.intro: Append-only record of admin actions, auth events, and money tools.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.sec1: Admin access requires the platform-admin role (or the operator token for automation).
settings.sec2: All admin mutations are written to the append-only audit log.
settings.sec3: Sessions use short-lived access tokens with single-use rotating refresh tokens.
settings.sec4: Passwords are PBKDF2-hashed; failed logins trigger temporary lockout.
settings.securityHint: 2FA (TOTP) and IP allowlisting are on the security roadmap.
settings.platformBody: Vitrin — on-premise, multi-tenant AI Commerce Intelligence Platform. Plans, credit limits and AI-gateway budgets are configured via the control plane and the .env secret store.

elasticsearch.title: Elasticsearch control
elasticsearch.intro: Inspect the cluster, manage catalogue indices, and run zero-downtime reindex + alias swaps.
elasticsearch.reindexHint: Build a fresh index from a source index, then swap the read alias (instant rollback).
elasticsearch.deleteConfirm: Delete index {index}? This cannot be undone.
elasticsearch.noIndices: No catalogue indices yet — create one.

agent.title: Agent console
agent.intro: Pick a store and test the grounded assistant against that store's own indexed data.
agent.messagePlaceholder: e.g. آیا کفش نایکی سایز ۴۲ موجود است؟
agent.empty: Send a message to test the assistant.

widget.title: Widget defaults
widget.intro: Platform-wide widget defaults. Stores can override branding from their own dashboard.
